defects.description: Administratum analyzer and bundle workflows wrote runtime outputs into tracked CURRENT_STATE analyzer files, dirtying worktree on ordinary runs.
defects.impact: Clean handoff impossible after routine analyzer checks.
repair_summary: Added runtime receipts with post-build hash/size/filename/source metadata
Added explicit checkpoint command for intentional commit-ready snapshots
remaining_risks: Legacy scripts outside patched set might still reference CURRENT_STATE analyzer paths and should be audited in larger structure task.
Legacy tracked analyzer files remain as historical snapshots and can still be edited manually if operator bypasses policy.

defects.description: Astronomicon v0.7 synthetic startup failure was reproduced and repaired with localized Write-Utf8Bom contract fix; rerun passed and first runtime smoke E2E passed with limitations.
defects.impact: Automated synthetic confidence run remains unreliable.
defects.expected: Synthetic full-run should complete 3 generated General Tasks through import/decompose/review receipt cycle.
defects.actual: Startup failed on empty string Content passed to Write-Utf8Bom; post-fix synthetic run completed with errors=0.
minimal_reproduction: trigger synthetic full run path in v0.7 dashboard
defects.proposed_repair_path: Isolate startup exception in v0.7 init path, rerun 3-task synthetic suite, update receipts.
remaining_risks: Runtime proof is smoke-level; full production orchestration remains scaffold.
Synthetic fixtures intentionally include orphan refinement cases.
repair_summary: Rerun completed 3 synthetic tasks successfully with exit_code=0.
Executed first runtime smoke E2E with PASS_WITH_LIMITATIONS verdict.

defects.description: Analyzer/report output can include escaped CRLF/diff-style readability noise.
defects.impact: Readability issue that can confuse reviews.
defects.proposed_repair_path: Normalize human-readable report rendering; avoid embedding escaped multiline status blocks when possible.
defects.current_assessment: Not observed as analyzer runtime corruption in this task; readability noise can still appear in manually assembled reports.
defects.validation_note: Current task normalized its own reports; older artifacts were not rewritten.

defects.description: Bundle receipt could lag final filename/hash/size if generated before final zip materialization.
defects.repair_summary: Runtime receipt written after zip generation with actual bundle fields.
remaining_risks: Legacy builders may still use older receipt pattern.
revalidation_evidence: TOOLS/build_chat_compilation_from_analysis.ps1 contains actual_bundle_filename/sha256/size and source metadata fields.

notes: Defect statuses reflect current task verification scope.
